name: audio-hooks
description: Audio notifications + AI-controlled config for Claude Code, Cursor IDE, and Codex CLI events. 26 hooks, native matcher routing, TTS, webhooks, status line, focus flow, rate-limit alerts. Auto-bridges to Cursor IDE 3.2.16+; native install via 'audio-hooks install --cursor' or 'audio-hooks install --codex'.

audio_theme.title: Audio theme
audio_theme.description: Audio theme: 'default' (voice recordings) or 'custom' (non-voice chimes). Leave blank for default.

webhook_url.title: Webhook URL (optional)
webhook_url.description: Optional webhook URL for Slack/Discord/Teams/ntfy/raw notifications. Leave blank to skip.

webhook_format.title: Webhook format
webhook_format.description: Webhook payload format: slack | discord | teams | ntfy | raw. Required when webhook_url is set.

tts_enabled.title: Enable text-to-speech
tts_enabled.description: Speak hook events using the system TTS engine. Default: false.
